evals.prompt: We just shipped OAuth login and we're adding CSV export to scope. In the future we also want to add SSO.
evals.expected_output: Claude reads git history and JOURNAL.md, marks OAuth as [x], adds CSV export as [x] (just shipped), adds SSO as [ ], updates PROJECT.md In Scope with CSV export, confirms before writing.
expectations: JOURNAL.md contains '- [x]' entry for OAuth login
JOURNAL.md contains '- [x]' entry for CSV export
PROJECT.md In Scope section includes CSV export
JOURNAL.md has no verbose sections (no '### What changed', no dates, no prose)

evals.prompt: We're switching from PostgreSQL to SQLite — single-user app, Postgres was overkill.
evals.expected_output: Claude updates PROJECT.md tech stack to SQLite, updates JOURNAL.md checklist to reflect the change, keeps format simple.
expectations: PROJECT.md Tech Stack section references SQLite instead of PostgreSQL
PROJECT.md Last Updated date was changed to today's date
JOURNAL.md remains a plain checklist with no verbose entries
JOURNAL.md contains a [x] item reflecting the SQLite migration or tech change

evals.prompt: Do a consistency check — make sure all our docs are in sync.
evals.expected_output: Claude reads PROJECT.md, JOURNAL.md, and CLAUDE.md, identifies any stale or conflicting content across them, proposes fixes, and confirms before writing. If everything is consistent, says so and stops.
expectations: Claude reads all available docs before proposing changes
Claude identifies at least one consistency issue if any exist, or explicitly confirms docs are in sync
No file is modified without showing a proposed change and getting confirmation
JOURNAL.md format remains a plain checklist after any updates
